assignments.name: prompt
assignments.value:
=You are a real estate assistant. Extract the 3-5 most compelling property highlights from this listing description. These will be used to personalize follow-up messages to open house attendees.

Return ONLY a short comma-separated list. Each item should be 2-5 words, specific, and factual — only include details explicitly stated in the description. Never invent or assume details.

Example output: vaulted ceilings, updated kitchen, large fenced backyard, 2-car garage, main floor primary

Listing description:
{{ $json.listing_description }}

Return ONLY the comma-separated list. No labels, no explanation.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO workflow_events (client_id, workflow_name, event_type, payload)
VALUES (
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT id FROM clients
     WHERE primary_contact_email = '{{ $json.body.agent_email }}'
     LIMIT 1),
    'e2f9934c-4d28-4bb4-ac90-4284c1123517'::uuid
  ),
  'open_house_setup',
  'triggered',
  jsonb_build_object('execution_id', '{{ $execution.id }}')
)

INSERT INTO workflow_events (client_id, workflow_name, event_type, payload)
VALUES (
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT id FROM clients
     WHERE primary_contact_email = '{{ $node["Receive Setup"].json.body.agent_email }}'
     LIMIT 1),
    'e2f9934c-4d28-4bb4-ac90-4284c1123517'::uuid
  ),
  'open_house_setup',
  'completed',
  jsonb_build_object('execution_id', '{{ $execution.id }}')
)
